sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20979" key="briqu/noos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρῑθύ-νοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n20979.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grave-minded, thoughtful,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
